briefing.art: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, with optimistic 2026 outlook. US holds 44% market share. Fine art lots >$1M grew 21%.
briefing.stocks: Indian Sensex/Nifty up ~0.87% on March 18, 2026. Nifty IT jumped 4%. US Federal Reserve policy meeting today is the key focus; oil prices easing slightly.
